analysis.consistency: High. The name, type, and rarity are consistent across the provided data points.
analysis.quality: High. The description is specific and mechanically clear. It correctly references the 'telekinesis' spell and imposes a specific limitation on its use (targeting only unattended objects).

mechanics.primary_effect: Grants the ability to cast the _telekinesis_ spell at will.
mechanics.limitation: The spell cast via the ring can only target objects that are not being worn or carried (unattended objects).

analysis.notes: The raw data mentions the source rarity structure, which confirms the 'Very Rare' status and attunement requirement.
